cues.title: SIEGE THE STRONGHOLD

factions.strategic_intent: Gather, fortify, and break a rival stronghold.
Hold the eastern stronghold and counterattack.
Scout crossroads and preserve its stronghold.

events.summary: Exchange one: Sol's siege damages Terra's wall; Terra's commander answers from cover.
Terra wall: 180 → 92 HP. The core remains untouched.

factions.strategic_intent: Gather, fortify, and break a rival stronghold.
Hold the eastern stronghold and counterattack.
Scout crossroads and preserve its stronghold.

events.summary: Exchange two: the wall breaks. Siege fire now reaches Terra's core.

factions.strategic_intent: Gather, fortify, and break a rival stronghold.
Hold the eastern stronghold and counterattack.
Scout crossroads and preserve its stronghold.

events.summary: Exchange three: Terra's stronghold falls; its units and holdings are removed.
Two strongholds remain. Sol must still outlast Luna — conquest is last stronghold standing.

cues.subtitle: Sol wins this siege, but conquest ends only when a single stronghold is still standing.
cues.title: ONE RIVAL REMAINS

best_decision.summary: Committed research, guard, and siege only after the scout exposed the route.

biggest_failure.summary: Left the workshop workers briefly exposed while the scout crossed crossroads.

best_decision.summary: Used its wall to absorb the first exchange and protect the core.

biggest_failure.summary: Could not replace the breached wall before the siege reached the core.

best_decision.summary: Scouted crossroads without losing its initial units.

biggest_failure.summary: Did not contest Sol's route before the eastern siege began.
